heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyThese is Privacy Policy of Road Soft.Road Softwhich    provides you with theSpeed Camera Radarapplication.Speed Camera Radarrespects your right to privacy. Your ability to make informed    choices about the use of your information is important to us. This Privacy Policy explainsSpeed Camera Radar’spolicy regarding the collection, use, disclosure and    protection of any    information we receive. “You” means an end user of the "Speed    Camera Radar" Application.We hope you enjoy using

Speed Camera RadarAnywhere, as much as we do making it    but    it is an expensive service to run due to the very high server and bandwidth costs. Therefore we    subsidise it by collecting and sharing ad IDs, network information and location data with    selected    third parties globally for market research, among other purposes and to show you ads more    relevant    to you.    By agreeing you allow us and our partners to process & store your data for the purposes    described
above. For more details and to review our trusted partners list please review our privacy    policy. If    you are under 16 you must ask your parents or guardian.
Information We Collect:Signals and data will be collected by the various

sensors on your mobile phone, such as    Accelerometer, GPS, Barometer, WiFi, Bluetooth, Cellular network, Gyroscope, Magnetometer, etc.    We use these signals and data in order to obtain data regarding your mobility status and    location and to perform analytics (including predictive analytics) with respect to the same (“Mobility        and Location Data”).Some of the information that we collect from you may be deemed Personal    Information. “Personal Information” means information that can be

directly associated with a specific person or information about activities directly linked to a    person, such as that person’s location. The Personal Information that we collect includes    mobility status and location information as well as information regarding the existence of    third-party applications on your device.Some of this information will be collected even if the    Application is in background

(this is needed for feature when USER (as a driver) turns device screen off and just wants to    hear voice tips about road dangerous without interacting with UI of app).    You are not required by law to provide us with any such information,    but by using the Application and agreeing to this Privacy Policy, you agree to    provide us with such information.We automatically collect certain information when you use our Application, including your device
information, operating system, system logs, usage statistics, etc.We may share your Personal Information, including the

Mobility and Location Data, with members of    our corporate family, third party vendors, service providers or analytics partners.    We may also authorize third party vendors, service providers or partners to    collect information, including Mobility and Location Data, on our behalf or in cooperation with    us and to use this information for their own purposes.How we Protect InformationWe make efforts to follow generally accepted industry standards to protect

Personal Information    submitted to us, both during transmission and once we receive it. However, no method of    transmission over the Internet or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. Therefore, while    we strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect your Personal Information, we cannot    guarantee its absolute security.How we Use InformationExcept as expressly set forth herein, we will not share your Personal Information with third

parties without your explicit permission, except when required by law, regulation, subpoena or    court order or in cooperation with law enforcement authorities. We may use Personal Information    internally – for
example, to develop and improve our products, help diagnose problems with    our servers, to make our services more useful, to customize our services and personalize their    content for you.

We use the information that we collect, including the Personal Information in order to provide    you with the services in our Application.In addition, by analyzing all information we receive, including all information concerning users    and their geo-location and use of third-party applications, we may compile statistical    information across a variety of users and mobile applications (“Statistical        Information”). Statistical Information helps us understand trends and

customer needs so that new products and services can be considered and so existing products and    services can be tailored to customer desires. Statistical Information isanonymous. We    may share    such anonymous Statistical Information with our partners or with third parties, or use it for    our own purposes, without restriction, on commercial terms that we can determine in our sole    discretion.Communications

We may send you email messages, push notifications and other messages about us or our products    and services. By using the Application, you affirmatively consent to receive such commercial    messages. As a registered member, you can remove your personal information from our mailing list    and stop receiving future communication from us by following the unsubscribe link located at the    bottom of each communication or by emailing us at < Please provide link>. You will also be

given the opportunity to unsubscribe from commercial messages in any such email or notification    that we send. Please note that we reserve the right to send you service related communications,    including service announcements and administrative messages, relating either to your account or    to your transactions on this site, without offering you the opportunity to opt out of receiving    them unless you cancel your account. Opt-out email address is:lelic.dev@gmail.com

Inspection, Correction, Deleting Your Data.You may update, review or correct your information, at any time by e-mailing us atlelic.dev@gmail.com.You can request the deletion of the Personal Information provided upon registration and disable    future collection of Personal Information by contacting us atlelic.dev@gmail.com. We    cannot    restore information that we have deleted. We will retain your information for as long as your    account is active or as needed to provide you services.

Other Uses or Transfer of Your InformationWe will fully cooperate with any law enforcement authorities or court order requesting or    directing us to disclose the identity, behavior or digital content of any user suspected to have    engaged in illegal or infringing behavior.We may use subcontractors that are located in countries other than your own, and send them    information we receive. All our subcontractors will be subject to non-disclosure and non-use

obligations. Nevertheless, some countries may have levels of protection of personal and other    information which are not as high as in your country of residence or business.We may transfer our databases containing your Personal Information if we sell our business or    part of it.Compliance of GDPR since May 25 2018 for EU countriesPressing AGREE button you confirm you are over 16 year old, otherwise press DISAGREE button

According compliance of GDPR once an user account is created, you can contact us to have it    deleted.Your account has a right to be forgotten - just contact to email lelic.dev@gmail.com to ask    delete your

personal user data from the cloudTo help us improve our service we collect the following information on an anonymous basis:    Operating System, BluetoothName, Carrier Code (Android only), Carrier Name, Sim Code, Charging    Status, Device Model, Device Manufacturer, Country, Locale, Bundle ID, Date & time, SSID    (network), BSSID (network), Latitude, Longitude, Accuracy (GPS), Scanned networks. In addition    to helping us to measure the usage of our app this anonymous information is shared with third

parties for their business purposes, including the creation of reports, market research and    trend analysis. One of these third parties is Huq, data shared does not contain information from    which users can be identified and we will not provide ad

ditional information to such third    parties that enables such third parties to identify you. You can find a full description of Huq    and what it does with the information collected via our app here.List of SDK partnersMonedata (DATA PAYMENTS OÃœ, LasnamÃ¤e linnaosa, LÃµÃµtsa tn 5-11, Tallinn, 11415,        Estonia, info@monedata.io)This app uses third-party addons that collect varied data, which may include device

identifiers, location, mobile network coverage and performance, installed apps list and        usage stats.        With the user's consent, this data will be collected and shared with those third-parties for        analysis and measurement purposes. The user can change his mind at any time by changing the        consent.
